claim_boundary: This ledger records bounded implementation progress only. It never authorizes runtime identity, plant action, a tag, publication, certification, physical safety, calibrated posterior inference, paper reproduction, or a scientific claim. OPEN and IN_PROGRESS are not passes; LOCAL_PASS cannot satisfy external or independent gates.

defect_traceability.closure_rule: Close only when distinct typed simulation and plant vectors plus live role tests pass.
Close only when attach, grant, revoke, and observer non-authority negatives pass with authenticated principals.
Close only when declare, retire, exhaustion, restart vectors, and live stream traces pass.
Close only when generated identity projections and independent exact-match and rejection results agree.
Close only when transcript-swap negatives and model-to-Rust refinement pass.
Close only when per-message actor and route provenance plus live rotation and revocation pass.
Close only when body-issued dispositions, query and replay tests, and composed live traces pass.
Close only when acquire, conflict, transfer, expiry, restart, and multi-writer campaigns pass.
Close only when the extension route is registered and disjoint, core-route rejection passes, and visuals are corrected.
Close only when the bypass is deleted and malformed and wrong-context ESTOP mutants fail at the latch boundary.
Close only when missingness mapping and independent statistical and scientific claim review pass.
Close only when bounded models, witnesses, refinement, and mutation evidence are retained and reviewed.
Close only when names are owned, clean installs and advisory resolution pass, and SBOM and publication receipts exist.
Close only when current surfaces are regenerated and frozen 0.8 byte identity remains unchanged.
Close only when body-issued authority lifecycle and live distributed transition evidence pass.
Close only when semantic public-trust projection and live rebind and revoke tests pass.
Close only when release identity is accepted and external exact-subject authorization passes.

lens_mapping.name: Contract and semantics
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: Both taxonomies must pass; disagreement across prose, types, schemas, wire, generated packages, or SemVer remains a failure.

lens_mapping.name: Security and authority
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: Identity, provenance, cryptography, authority, safety, and hostile-parser obligations all apply; an unknown or missing value grants nothing.

lens_mapping.name: Safety and plant boundary
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: Authority, lifecycle, human recovery, and counterfactual hazard review all pass; protocol ESTOP never becomes physical certification.

lens_mapping.name: Distributed systems
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: Ordering, replay, lifecycle, determinism, and ecosystem composition all pass across loss, partition, restart, concurrency, and partial commit.

lens_mapping.name: Resource and real-time bounds
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: Parser, resource, deployment, queue, deadline, storage, and overload bounds are explicit before allocation and fail closed.

lens_mapping.name: Interoperability and migration
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: Reproducibility, API/FFI/SemVer, wire parity, and composition all pass in independent installed implementations without silent translation.

lens_mapping.name: Science and statistics
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: Claim scope, estimand/statistics, provenance, and evidence quality all pass; missing variables and simulations cannot be promoted.

lens_mapping.name: Implementation and operations
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: APIs, deployment, observability, recovery, accessibility, and human governance are executable and hard to misuse.

lens_mapping.name: Verification and evidence
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: Mathematical, reproducibility, evidence-quality, negative, and counterfactual obligations all pass at their stated abstraction only.

lens_mapping.name: Lifecycle and governance
lens_mapping.stricter_rule: Claims, provenance, forensics, ecosystem ownership, human governance, revocation, support, and succession are explicit and current.

perspective_mapping.name: Protocol and security correctness
perspective_mapping.required_question: Does the change preserve exact semantics, verified identity and authority, fail-closed behavior, and the plant safety boundary under hostile or ambiguous input?

perspective_mapping.name: Consumer and runtime usability
perspective_mapping.required_question: Can independent consumers implement, operate, observe, recover, migrate, and bound the behavior without private forks or unsafe defaults?

perspective_mapping.name: Operational and scientific evidence
perspective_mapping.required_question: Do retained evidence, statistics, non-claims, independent review, release governance, and lifecycle ownership justify exactly the stated status?

commands.command: B00 focused ledger, schema, generator, supply-chain, audit, prose, spelling, link, diff, and diagram checks
B00 responsive light/dark recovery-view render and visual inspection
verify local HEAD, origin/main, advertised refs/heads/main object, and clean worktree

perspective_reviews.rationale: The ledger is strict-schema and content-hash checked, hostile status/receipt mutations fail closed, credentials and absolute host paths are rejected, and the coordination claim boundary grants no identity, authority, plant action, certification, or release.

The generated task and resumption views expose the dependency DAG, preserved dirty state, exact consumer roles, recovery instructions, evidence floors, and the next dependency-ready task without requiring private state or optimistic inference.

The exact source, remote object, commands, full log, visual renders, reviewer decision, limitations, rollback, and ten external NOT_RUN gates are retained; scientific, physical-safety, interoperability, and release claims remain explicitly excluded.

residual_risks: B00 has bounded local evidence only; it has no external or independent evidence and grants no release authorization.
All protocol implementation, consumer integration, formal qualification, live-security, physical-boundary, performance, publication, and certification work remains open in descendant tasks.
The complete local preflight preserves warnings about duplicate transitive dependencies and the tracked release-blocking RustSec advisory; neither was waived by this coordination-task pass.

The status/evidence commit that records this receipt is necessarily newer than the tested implementation cut; trust it only after its generated views and evidence hashes pass focused equality checks and its exact remote object is verified.
tasks.reviewer_comment: B00 reached LOCAL_PASS from the exact pushed implementation cut `6381d2a7cc82f442a538df7616758dd1348714e6`. The retained complete preflight passed all 20 local stages and ended with external release gates explicitly NOT RUN. Earlier runs at `f3e5b257933fcb331afbd13229a43c7eb33a7897` and `6cbf5d6edfc20e265016aebecef98d4f31fdbe75` remain failed evidence and were not used for promotion. On resume, first determine whether this receipt/status update is already the verified clean `origin/main` object: if not, validate, commit, push, and verify it; if so, start only dependency-ready B04. B04 must characterize authenticated ingress and an independent parser before ADR ratification or normative implementation. Do not infer that B00 changed the unreleased 1.0 wire, cleared a release gate, or completed any consumer integration.
tasks.rollback_or_recovery: Revert only the eventual coherent B00 commits if the ledger gate is defective; preserve the pushed audit baseline and every consumer worktree.

ten_lens_reviews.rationale: The checked catalog, dependency DAG, evidence class, source hashes, generated views, and status transitions agree; B00 is coordination-only and does not alter the normative contract.
Credentials, private keys, absolute local paths, malformed receipts, unbound pushes, and optimistic pass transitions are rejected; no ledger value grants runtime identity or authority.
The claim boundary states that coordination evidence cannot authorize plant action, ESTOP certification, safe action, or physical safety; all plant work remains open.
Cross-repository work is represented as dependency-ordered, independently committed tasks with exact receipt binding, reopen invalidation, and preserved partial/dirty state.
Ledger depth, task count, string size, evidence file size, aggregate bytes, artifact references, command counts, and transition counts are explicitly bounded before semantic acceptance.
Nine consumer roles, repository baselines, provider-first ordering, pid-rs dependency direction, and exact immutable consumer pins are represented without claiming installed interoperability.
Simulation, calibration, paper reproduction, posterior, PID, and missing-evidence claims cannot be upgraded by ledger state; B00 records evidence provenance only.
Generated Markdown supplies readable status, recovery checkpoints, next tasks, rollback, preserved worktrees, and mandatory reading; desktop/mobile light/dark QA passed.
Hostile mutants, strict JSON Schema, generated equality, content hashes, exact Git objects, full local preflight, retained logs, and visual evidence support exactly LOCAL_PASS and no higher claim.
Ownership, rollback, restart instructions, evidence floors, remote verification, release non-authorization, and all ten external NOT_RUN gates remain explicit and machine checked.

receipt.environment: Darwin 25.5.0 arm64; exact clean NCP main worktree; local build/test, loopback network, package archives, current-plus-pinned advisory replay, repo-less archived-source preflight, and responsive browser QA; no external qualification environment represented.
residual_risks: B00 has bounded local evidence only; it has no external or independent evidence and grants no release authorization.
All protocol implementation, consumer integration, formal qualification, live-security, physical-boundary, performance, publication, and certification work remains open in descendant tasks.
The complete local preflight preserves warnings about duplicate transitive dependencies and the tracked release-blocking RustSec advisory; neither was waived by this coordination-task pass.
The status/evidence commit that records this receipt is necessarily newer than the tested implementation cut; its generated views and evidence hashes require focused equality checks before push.
receipt.rollback_or_recovery: Revert only the B00 coordination commits if the ledger or generated recovery views prove defective; preserve consumer worktrees and retained failed/pass evidence, reopen B00 with a content-bound coordination receipt, and invalidate descendant receipts exactly as the checker requires.

commands.command: Run the exact-cut Zenoh metadata probe, TLS-terminating ingress runner, and complete signed-forwarding Python, Node, and differential runner sequentially with fail-fast and pipefail
Run the bounded current RustSec preparer self-test, same-commit shallow current cargo-deny scan, pinned replay, byte-equivalence proof, and supply-chain evidence validation
Verify local HEAD, origin/main tracking object, advertised refs/heads/main object, source tree, and clean tracked worktree

perspective_reviews.rationale: The exact Zenoh probe disproves application-visible transport identity, the TLS and signed-forwarding alternatives preserve distinct carrier and signer axes, and all accepted prototype results remain authentication evidence without NCP lease, lifecycle, operation, plant, or actuator authority.

The quarantined Python/libsodium and native TypeScript/Node/OpenSSL implementations use distinct JSON and cryptographic stacks and agree on 31 public-only cases. Static profiles, explicit limits, exact dependencies, and global reject make implementation behavior visible without creating a consumer dependency or silent fork.

The pushed source commit, section receipts, successful and failed command outputs, public corpus, environment, bounds, same-commit advisory proof, complete local preflight, non-claims, and residual risks support exactly LOCAL_PASS. Fable advice and the second implementation are not misclassified as independent review or external evidence.

residual_risks: Ingress trusted-computing-base isolation, co-tenancy, memory-corruption containment, authenticated manifest provenance, and live A-over-B composition remain unproved.
Live rotation, revocation, continuing authorization, trusted time, private-key custody, and exact multi-instance deployment behavior remain NOT RUN.

The Python replay store is cooperative same-host state; filesystem rollback, non-cooperating same-UID writers, shared filesystems, replicated ownership, multi-host replay, disk-full, kill-during-COMMIT, and WAL-aware recovery remain unproved.
The Node implementation proves parser and cryptographic implementation diversity but does not implement durable replay and is not an independent human review or installed peer.
Full-sized profile sweeps, combinatorial fuzzing, sanitizers, duration testing, soak, performance qualification, independent interoperability, and every external gate remain NOT RUN.
RUSTSEC-2026-0041 remains tracked and release-blocking; the bounded current advisory gate neither waives nor hides it.
tasks.reviewer_comment: B04 reached LOCAL_PASS from pushed source commit 3754635404f362bb700c324f4dba613a3b73b3eb, tree 5e4b0e8a455eae677cc922d417121caf2d1c35d9. The exact-cut run re-executed the pinned Zenoh source/live probe, TLS 1.3 prototype A, 26 Python signed-forwarding tests, 21 native Node/OpenSSL tests, and a 31-case process-isolated public-only differential corpus with zero negative acceptance. The complete 20-stage repository preflight passed and retained the tracked release-blocking advisory while all external gates remained NOT RUN. The Node implementation uses its own bounded JSON parser and OpenSSL stack, but supplies implementation diversity rather than independent human review, replay diversity, or installed interoperability. Eight exact claude-fable-5 consultations remain non-normative; the final gate challenge improved same-commit advisory equivalence and Git/resource isolation but did not raise evidence class. Direct Zenoh production-secure remains fail-closed, no stable wire or shipping package changed, and no identity, lease, operation, plant, safety, release, or certification claim follows. B01 is now dependency-ready, but its INDEPENDENT floor still requires qualifying non-owner review.

reviewers.role: local prototype implementation and evidence reviewer

tasks.rollback_or_recovery: If the B04 local receipt or quarantined prototypes prove defective, reopen B04, bind the coordination receipt to the exact defect evidence, invalidate content-bound descendant receipts, revert only the affected B04 and gate-repair commits, preserve all retained failed/pass logs and unrelated repositories, and keep direct Zenoh production-secure disabled.

ten_lens_reviews.rationale: No proto, stable Rust type, JSON Schema, vector, compact hash, baseline, conformance manifest, or package surface changed; the outer ingress profiles and exact actor/route bytes remain quarantined and non-normative.

Payload and Zenoh source claims never self-authenticate. TLS derives a verified leaf mapping, signed forwarding retains distinct carrier and signer identities, and unknown, stale, ambiguous, downgraded, substituted, or mismatched inputs reject.

Default-deny exact grants cover only prototype route, plane, class, and role. Neither a certificate nor a signature creates an NCP lease, operation outcome, lifecycle transition, authority grant, or plant admission.

Direct Zenoh remains unavailable for production-secure use, A-direct and B-over-A profiles are statically distinct, and replay, restart, rotation, removal, recovery epoch, duplicate delivery, and crash-window behavior are explicit rather than negotiated from input.

Frame, JSON, header, payload, manifest, base64url, integer, node, member, depth, string, replay-scope, database, path, advisory-clone, command-output, and time limits are checked before or at the relevant boundary.

Python/PyNaCl and native TypeScript/Node/OpenSSL implementations share no parser or FFI and agree on the retained corpus; the receipt explicitly excludes replay diversity, installed-peer interoperability, and independent human review.

Exact key and certificate content addresses, manifest epochs, overlap and removal tests, signed recovery epochs, and staleness checks are local; provenance, custody, trusted time, continuing revocation, and multi-instance atomicity remain NOT RUN.
No network acceptance is described as physical safety, ESTOP certification, universal safe action, or actuator authority. Crebain and body-local final authority remain downstream and unchanged.

JavaScript-safe integers, literal ASCII routes, exact received signing strings, distinct parser and crypto stacks, public-only vectors, exact dependency locks, and global reject expose cross-language ambiguity without creating a consumer fork.

Exact commits, trees, remote objects, section receipts, successful and failed logs, corpus hashes, bounds, tool versions, same-commit RustSec outputs, rollback, residual risks, and all NOT RUN gates justify only LOCAL_PASS.

Live rotation, revocation, continuing authorization, trusted time, private-key custody, and exact multi-instance deployment behavior remain NOT RUN.

residual_risks: All eleven ADRs remain PROPOSED and have no qualifying owner or independent same-digest review; B01 has not reached any passing evidence class.
The generated registry is intentionally non-normative and outside contract/; promotion and the deliberate candidate rebaseline remain blocked.

Wire examples remain draft JSON only. Independent Python/Node syntax replay and the exact clean-source preliminary model/resource run pass, but the retained result is bounded non-passing working evidence; canonical formal work, refinement, and every downstream implementation remain open.

Five usable exact Fable 5 consultations are non-normative challenge input only. Five failed or incomplete attempts returned no complete usable answer, and no model response counts as review, proof, interoperability, or evidence.
The current 1.0.0-rc.1 normative digest and compact hash are unchanged; external security, plant, consumer, performance, supply-chain, and release gates remain NOT RUN or blocked.
tasks.reviewer_comment: The strengthened preliminary probe source is pushed and remote-verified at `81941954f33078aa6a8dd85d70e392aae5469246`. Its exact clean-source run bound tree `dc2c433e5e09cce9f03e981d9cbed44f84e72d00`, the unchanged normative digest `9cae331742d01e9b164e029aa06c644e6b1886176d0816a6ef883af138355c90`, the exact contract-manifest file, Z3 binary, 13 prototype sources, Git cleanliness, and the fifth exact `claude-fable-5` response. It explored 11,444 composition states, 35 deny states, and 1,415 complete wire-cutover states; killed all 23 registered model and four SMT mutations; passed eleven SMT checks; and detected the registered queue/parser/journal/real-Ed25519 faults. ADR-008 is proposed at SHA-256 `1379477feebd886823d1511af5df0b7a7019795aef9ee8023147a4ef0a5f56b6` and ADR-011 at `96d243fd41868a70fc00c0f309a5f87e0058f6fce5308e2c98d147e18f76421f`. The raw exact-source log SHA-256 is `08ba5c52a42b505eb409734b218cf793380778c2f44cc9d151589e2364222c94`; its retained deterministic gzip SHA-256 is `eb885f3c430e41f3386a860fc9cd74e23b4a1244ed94d03db281d7565d371603`, and the canonical retained result SHA-256 is `3f140dad12147500048644899f69893c1dd985d0001c900ec66b18143be51fe7`. The earlier `541e1e7` working result is superseded by changed ADR/prototype bytes and grants no evidence. All retained files remain non-passing working evidence: current commands, artifacts, and reviewers remain empty, every ADR remains PROPOSED, and B01 stays IN_PROGRESS. Next publish the exact review packet and obtain qualifying same-digest owner and independent reviews. Do not create the normative registry, alter ADR bytes or wire sources, start B02/B03/F01/N tasks, or infer release readiness.
